title: physaria geyeri subsp. geyeri
intro: Physaria geyeri subsp. geyeri, also known as Geyeri's bladderpod, is a plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Physaria geyeri subsp. geyeri include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Physaria geyeri subsp. geyeri can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
